item.description:
# Clip 1.3.4
Clip 1.3.4 gives native Live Share windows a cleaner CoScreen-inspired frame and adds a true Native 100% viewing mode.
## Live Share
- Replace the receiver's visible macOS title bar and redundant source chip with a thick friend-colored outer frame and matching draggable header. - Keep viewer controls translucent while idle and make them fully visible on hover. - Add Fit to Window and Native 100% modes, a zoom indicator, and a command to reset the window to its actual logical size. - Preserve the shared window at 100% in Native mode. Oversized content is cropped and smoothly follows the focused remote cursor without exposing blank space. - Capture and display the cursor only for the focused shared source, including protection against delayed cursor messages after focus changes. - Preserve source-logical sizing across Retina and non-Retina displays and keep resized viewer windows safely inside the visible screen.
This is an app-only update. The Live Share server and web viewer are unchanged.
## Requirements
Clip requires macOS 15 or later on Apple silicon. This build uses the same stable Apple Development identity as previous updater releases.
